domains_methodology: Registered + deployed publication domains across the Bankruptcy Transparency Network. Counts each apex domain and each functionally distinct subdomain separately. See https://openbankruptcyproject.org/network/ for the public inventory.
pages_methodology: Total HTML pages across the Bankruptcy Transparency Network, English + Spanish + German + Polish + French + Italian. Last full count 2026-05-23: 48,977 active pages (openbankruptcyproject.org 37,854 + statute-sites 10,339 + 1328f.com 784, excluding stale backups and not-owned mirrors). Spanish layer: 3,000+.
